title: DeDi Endpoint Record
description: A machine-readable endpoint advertisement for a DeDi participant. Use this schema to publish the service URLs, transport protocols, and associated key identifiers for an entity whose endpoints need to be discoverable.

endpoint_id.description: Unique identifier for this endpoint record.

subscriber_id.description: Identifier of the entity that owns these endpoints.

endpoints.description: One or more endpoint entries for this entity.

type.description: The service or protocol type this endpoint provides. Examples: callback, webhook, api, grpc.

signing_key_id.description: Optional reference to the public key used to sign requests sent to or from this endpoint.

retiredAt.description: When this endpoint was retired, if applicable.

publishedAt.description: When this endpoint record was published or last updated.
